answer: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express (1-2 days) is available at checkout.
We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unused and in original packaging.
We accept Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, and Cash on Delivery.
Orders can be cancelled within 1 hour of placement. Contact support@store.com.
Ask me to look up your order by order ID or user ID and I'll fetch the status for you.
